title: Senior Android Engineer (Remote)
description:
Nimbus Labs is a remote-first product company building a consumer mobile platform used by millions. We are hiring a Senior Android Engineer to join our fully distributed engineering team (working language: English).

What you'll do:
- Build and maintain our Android application in Kotlin and Java
- Collaborate on architecture for offline-first, real-time features
- Integrate with IoT/Bluetooth hardware and our backend APIs
- Mentor mid-level engineers and drive code quality in an Agile team

What we're looking for:
- 4+ years of professional Android development (Kotlin and/or Java)
- Solid CS fundamentals: algorithms, concurrency, software architecture
- Experience integrating with hardware (BLE, embedded devices) is a strong plus
- Comfortable in a fully remote, asynchronous environment

Nice to have:
- C++ for native modules
- Experience with automation/CI
- Security-minded development

Compensation: 3,500 - 4,500 EUR/month net, depending on experience. Fully remote (work from anywhere in Europe). Contractor (B2B) or employment both possible.
